Chemicals

Monitor ATEX zone equipment without entering them

Detect faults across pumps, fans, compressors, and centrifuges in your chemical plants. SAM4 installs in the motor control cabinet, safely outside hazardous areas.

€1.7M
Cost prevented over 3 years at DuPont
40%
Downtime reduction at DuPont
15+
Failures detected across 3 sites
Request a demo See results below
Trusted by leaders in chemicals and materials
DuPont DSM-Firmenich OCI
The challenge

ATEX zones leave little room for surprises

Chemical plants run 24/7 in explosive atmospheres where equipment cannot be easily instrumented.

Hazardous area monitoring
ATEX-rated zones prohibit many sensor types. SAM4 installs on power cables in the motor control cabinet. No entry into classified zones required.
Continuous process disruption
An unplanned pump or compressor failure can stop an entire production line. SAM4 gives weeks-to-months advance warning so you can schedule repairs during planned STOs.
Energy waste in rotating equipment
Oversized pumps, inefficient blowers, and poorly matched drives waste 5-35% of energy. SAM4 identifies waste with real-time performance data.
Compliance and safety pressure
SEVESO regulations and MOC procedures demand documented evidence of asset condition. SAM4 provides continuous monitoring records for process safety management.
What we monitor

Critical assets in chemical plants

SAM4 monitors any AC motor-driven equipment from the MCC.

Pumps
Process, transfer, and circulation pumps. SAM4 detects cavitation, seal wear, bearing degradation, and efficiency loss across all voltage ranges.
Pump monitoring details →
Compressors
Gas and air compressors with bearing, coupling, and driver fault detection for continuous chemical processes.
Compressor monitoring details →
Fans & blowers
Ventilation fans and process blowers with energy optimisation and early degradation alerts.
Fan monitoring details →
Proof

Chemical industry results

Featured

DuPont: €1.7M in costs prevented over 3 years

SAM4 detected 15+ failures across 3 European DuPont sites. The system covers 6 failure modes across pumps, fans, and compressors. Overall equipment downtime reduced by 40%.

€1.7M
Costs prevented
40%
Downtime reduction
15+
Failures detected

$90k
DuPont
Production loss prevented on a heated godet roll. SAM4 detected bearing degradation 6 weeks before planned shutdown.
Read case study →
€121k/yr
DuPont
Annual savings from predictive maintenance across monitored assets. Replacing reactive repairs with planned interventions.
Read case study →
Installation

No entry into hazardous zones

1
Clip on at the MCC SAM4 installs on the power cable inside the motor control cabinet. Outside ATEX zones. No hot work permit.
2
Connect to the network Cellular gateway sends data to the cloud. No plant network integration needed for deployment.
3
Monitor from anywhere The SAM4 dashboard shows asset health, fault alerts, and energy performance within hours.
SAM4 installation at the MCC

The results speak for themselves: it just works.

DuPont case study

From your first site to every plant
